items.label: StrikeLedger: Warn
items.description: Record a warning for this post author.

items.label: StrikeLedger: Warn
items.description: Record a warning for this comment author.

items.label: StrikeLedger: Warn and remove
items.description: Record a warning and remove this post.

items.label: StrikeLedger: Warn and remove
items.description: Record a warning and remove this comment.

items.label: StrikeLedger: Warn and mark NSFW
items.description: Record a warning and mark this post NSFW.

warnRemovePoints.label: Warn and remove point value
warnRemovePoints.helpText: Points added by StrikeLedger: Warn and remove.

warnNsfwPoints.label: Warn and mark NSFW point value
warnNsfwPoints.helpText: Points added by StrikeLedger: Warn and mark NSFW.

decayAmount.label: Decay amount
decayAmount.helpText: Active warning points removed each decay interval.

decayIntervalDays.label: Decay interval days
decayIntervalDays.helpText: Number of days per decay interval.

defaultPublicCommentTemplate.label: Default public comment template
defaultPublicCommentTemplate.defaultValue: Moderator notice: this content violates {ruleLabel}. {actionEffect} Target: {targetPermalink}

defaultPrivateUserNoticeTemplate.label: Default private user notice template
defaultPrivateUserNoticeTemplate.defaultValue: Your content in r/{subredditName} violated {ruleLabel}. {actionOutcome} This action added {pointsAdded} warning point(s). Your current active warning total is {activeTotal}. Target: {targetPermalink}. Please review the community rules before participating again.

defaultZeroPointPrivateUserNoticeTemplat.label: Zero-point private user notice template
defaultZeroPointPrivateUserNoticeTemplat.defaultValue: Your content in r/{subredditName} violated {ruleLabel}. {actionOutcome} This action was recorded without adding warning points. Your current active warning total is {activeTotal}. Target: {targetPermalink}. Please review the community rules before participating again.

defaultNativeModNoteTemplate.label: Default native mod note template
defaultNativeModNoteTemplate.defaultValue: StrikeLedger: {action} for {ruleLabel}. Points: {pointsAdded}. Active total: {activeTotal}. Target: {targetPermalink}

defaultZeroPointNativeModNoteTemplate.label: Zero-point native mod note template
defaultZeroPointNativeModNoteTemplate.defaultValue: StrikeLedger: {action} for {ruleLabel}. No points added. Active total: {activeTotal}. Target: {targetPermalink}

userNoticesEnabled.label: Send private user notices
userNoticesEnabled.helpText: Send a private message to the affected user when a warning is recorded.

nativeModNotesEnabled.label: Write native mod notes
nativeModNotesEnabled.helpText: Write a Reddit mod note on the affected user when a warning is recorded.

reversalNativeModNotesEnabled.label: Write reversal mod notes
reversalNativeModNotesEnabled.helpText: Write a Reddit mod note when a moderator reverses a warning.

distinguishAppComments.label: Distinguish app comments
distinguishAppComments.helpText: Mark app comments as moderator comments when Reddit allows it.

lockAppComments.label: Lock app comments
lockAppComments.helpText: Prevent replies to public comments posted by the app.

stickyCommentsWarn.label: Sticky comments for Warn
stickyCommentsWarn.helpText: Pin public app comments for Warn actions when the app posts one.

stickyCommentsWarnRemove.label: Sticky comments for Warn and remove
stickyCommentsWarnRemove.helpText: Pin public app comments for Warn and remove actions when the app posts one.

stickyCommentsWarnNsfw.label: Sticky comments for Warn and mark NSFW
stickyCommentsWarnNsfw.helpText: Pin public app comments for Warn and mark NSFW actions when the app posts one.
